case_title: MICHAEL HOLBERT VS. MERCURY ENGINEERING GROUP INC.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,751.21 FILED BY HOLBERT, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MERCURY ENGINEERING GROUP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED JUN-12-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERCURY ENGINEERING GROUP INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLBERT, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCURY ENGINEERING GROUP INC. $1,751.21 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,816.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLBERT, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MERCURY ENGINEERING GROUP INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEANETTE HOSCH--OFFICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
